title: celastrus rosthornianus var. rosthornianus
intro: Celastrus rosthornianus var. rosthornianus, also known as the Chinese staff vine or climbing staff, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Celastrus rosthornianus var. rosthornianus include reducing pain and swelling, as well as improving circulation and immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
